name: margem-viva
description: Margem Viva — site pessoal de Wagner Beethoven

scripts.dev: npm run build:css && run-p dev:css dev:serve
scripts.dev:incremental: npm run build:css && run-p dev:css dev:serve:incremental
scripts.gen:pfp: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const dir='src/assets/img/pfp';const files=fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(f=>/\.(jpg|jpeg|png|webp)$/i.test(f)).sort((a,b)=>b.localeCompare(a));const json=files.map(f=>{const name=f.replace(/\.[^.]+$/,'');const year=name.slice(0,4);const seq=name.slice(4);return{date:year,image:'/assets/img/pfp/'+f,alt:'Foto de perfil de '+year+(seq!=='0'&&seq!=='1'?' ('+seq+')':''),caption:year};});fs.writeFileSync('src/_data/pfp.json',JSON.stringify(json,null,2),'utf8');console.log('✔ pfp.json gerado com '+json.length+' fotos.');"
